The interrupted training run created `/app/model_full.bin` (117MB), which is under the 150MB limit, plus fastText-format files `/app/train.ft.txt`, `/app/valid.ft.txt`, and `/app/test.ft.txt`. No final `/app/model.bin` exists yet. The immediate next step is to evaluate the full model accuracy on the provided test set, then save it as `/app/model.bin` if it meets >=0.62.",
  "plan": "Run an unbuffered Python script to load `/app/model_full.bin`, evaluate precision@1 on `/app/test.ft.txt`, print size and accuracy, and if it passes both constraints move it to `/app/model.bin`. Then verify the final model file exists, its size, and its accuracy.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -u - <<'PY'
import os, fasttext
full='/app/model_full.bin'
out='/app/model.bin'
size_mb=os.path.getsize(full)/1024/1024
print(f'loading {full} size_mb={size_mb:.2f}')
m=fasttext.load_model(full)
n,p,r=m.test('/app/test.ft.txt')
print(f'test n={n} precision@1={p:.4f} recall@1={r:.4f}')
if size_mb < 150 and p >= 0.62:
    os.replace(full, out)
    print(f'saved {out}')
else:
    print('full model did not meet constraints')
PY
",
      "duration": 10.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -u - <<'PY'
import os, fasttext
p='/app/model.bin'
if os.path.exists(p):
    m=fasttext.load_model(p)
    n,acc,r=m.test('/app/test.ft.txt')
    print(f'{p} size_mb={os.path.getsize(p)/1024/1024:.2f} test n={n} acc={acc:.4f}')
    print('OK' if os.path.getsize(p)/1024/1024 < 150 and acc >= 0.62 else 'NOTOK')
else:
    print('NO model.bin')
PY
